hook.headline: If she doesn’t reply to THIS I’m retiring.

messages.text: leather jacket got you stuttering already huh
you walked in looking like final boss dlc
relax, you still on tutorial mode babe
tutorial didnt cover surviving that mirror lighting
that mirror lights up insecurities for sport
mine waved white flag soon as i tapped your story
blame the purple lights, they bully feelings
humble is keeping my jaw attached after that fit
jaw detachable now, add that to your resume?
skills include typing through emotional damage
emotional damage from a jacket is crazy
its the jacket and the phone combo, villain arc
every villain needs a vanity with good bulbs
drinks saturday. i'm choosing the place
